The Swipe Files
of the
Copywriting
SuperSTarS
Carline
anglade-Cole

-- 1 of 44 --

The Swipe Files of the Copywriting Superstars
Carline
ANGLADE-COLEBio:
After 12 years in the direct marketing industry working as a Group Publisher for Phillips Publishing
(now known as Healthy Directions) … and later as Executive Vice President for Georgetown Pub-
lishing House … Carline left the corporate world in 1999 and began her freelance career as a direct
mail copywriter.
Since then, she’s created multi-year controls for clients including Health Resources, True Health,
Healthy Directions, Weiss, NatureCity, Soundview Publications and Sun Chlorella USA. Most re-
cently, she’s been working on a book project for Oprah.
Testimonials:
A seasoned expert and creative genius!
“Carline is, quite simply, one of the most brilliant copywriters I’ve ever known…. Her unique per-
spective and red-hot sales copy have produced huge controls for major mailers from coast to coast.
They literally beg to get on her dance card…. If you have the chance to work with Carline, JUMP
at it!”
-- Clayton Makepeace
Copywriter & Publisher, The Total Package
Her copy is so hot … thank goodness she’s married to a fireman!
“It’s not often a new writer is added to our “go-to” arsenal, particularly as quickly as Carline was. We
still miss having her as an employee, but the controls she’s given us as a copywriter help temper
our grief. We would hire her to write for us even if we didn’t love her as much as we do.”
-- Erica Bullard
CMO, Healthy Directions
In one word, she’s AMAZING!
“Carline Anglade-Cole is without a doubt one of the finest copywriters I’ve ever had the pleasure to
work with. She’s extremely talented, fast and has an amazing number of controls to her name. I’ve
personally witnessed another well-respected business owner grovel and beg for a slot on her busy
schedule. If you’re ever fortunate enough to sign Carline up, you’ll understand why.”
-- Layne Lowery
President, Health Resources
Contact Info:
1460 River Station Drive
Lawrenceville, GA 30045
Daytime Phone: (770) 554-8878
Website: www.carlinecole.com
